Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and his guest Beau Meyer are in the high Colorado mountains chasing the trout now that the ice is off
Video.grandparentTitle: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — Icy Colorado Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The gang from Sport Fishing TV chase big fish feeding on mullet swarms.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sport Fishing TV | The Trillion
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: For their season finale, Paul and Ray tackle a remote lake adventure with a precarious beaver dam to navigate. With help from Dan and Ben, the team enjoys a day full of thrilling walleye and bass fishing. The perfect finish? A shore lunch at camp with Outdoor Flavours adding unforgettable flavor to their catch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Remote Lake Showdown

Video.summary: We brought in Tony Roach to talk about a popular topic in these parts: summer walleye fishing! Lots of good tips packed into this week's episode, especially if you're a fan of the gravel lizard!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Summer Walleye Strategies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and good friend Les Butters team up to tackle some deepwater largemouth bass in St. George Utah
Video.grandparentTitle: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — Fishing in the Deep
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Some of the most incredible parts of fishing includes traveling to new destinations, making new friends, and catching new fish. Shea McIntee and the crew travel north to Santa Barbra and jump on board the 58-foot charter boat, the Coral Sea. We get extra lucky because mother nature allows us to travel up the coastline into a territory that most people don't get the opportunity to fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Full Speed Rock Fishing on the Coral Sea
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dead in the Water
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Dead in the Water
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Top anglers go after the biggest fish in top saltwater destinations.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sportfishing TV | Epic Magdalena Bay
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman Pro Vs Joe Lake-Onondaga
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Lake-Onondaga
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace head to Sturgeon Lake in Sunset Country to catch walleyes, pike and lake trout.
Video.grandparentTitle: Linder's Angling Edge | Fishing Ontario’s Sturgeon Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hook Line and Snook
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Hook Line and Snook
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Dan Lindner roll up their sleeves for a seek and destroy mission to find big summer bluegills.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Summer Blue Gills
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner, Ron Dohm Jr. and Chad Ditts spend the day spotting and dropping on big Lake Michigan Lakers.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Fast Action Giant Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In 1966, a 19-year-old, Wisconsin farm boy's life changed forever when he was drafted into the Army and shipped over to Vietnam. Now a soldier, Glenn engaged in numerous battles, and scouted for the infamous "tunnel rats" in the Vietnam War. The lone survivor in his platoon, the most heart-breaking s
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Vietnam Veteran Glenn Franks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe South Florida Canals1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Joe - South Florida Canals1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe Sophomore Jinx1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Joe - Sophomore Jinx
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stoked On Fishing jumps on board the Top Gun 80 out of San Diego, California, for Stan Vanderburg's annual five-day Rod & Reel Radio charter. We go offshore and have an absolute blast. In part two, we run right into a Yellowfin Tuna school, and the boat goes bonkers.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Epic Five Day Fishing Charter on the Top One 80, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman's Pro vs Joe-All -Snook- Up
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - All -Snook- Up
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lake Winnebago has finally frozen, and perch fishing is good! This week, we're in our backyard doing sight fishing with lightning lance! We'll also show off how our guiding business works, so hang onto your hineys!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch

Video.summary: Ice Fishing is here! This week, we're heading north on the hunt for solid ice! We'll be meeting up with our friends from Eskimo, Bite Me Box, and Beavertail baits to catch some perch!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 1
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Wilderness Smallmouth Part 1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Deep in the Northern Ontario backcountry, Paul and Perry push their way through dense forest trails and over a series of stubborn beaver dams with the UTV to reach a remote, untouched lake. The grind pays off in a big way as the walleye action erupts the moment they hit the water. With the sun climbing and temperatures rising fast, the crew puts together an incredible morning bite before heading out—proving once again that adventure, effort, and exploration are all part of the FishON! experience.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Wild Trail Walleye Mission

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building Bladed Jigs
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin is off to Central Florida to fish with veteran angler Bernie Schultz.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Feel the Bern
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Being in the Right Place at the Right Time for Huge Bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | All About Timing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin uses cool new bait to help catch finicky bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | New Spin on Finesse
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bass fishing in late summer can be tough, watch as Dusing shows ways to overcome the tough conditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Late Summer Bass Smash
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks fishing and social media with Foundation Outdoors media expert Jake Hutcheson.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Jake Hutcheson
Video.title: Episode 1
